name: Alastor (Hazbin Hotel)
description:
📻 | He invites you to his broadcast

Any!POV | Silly Thing | SFW intro

↳ Alastor has come to the realization that the people want someone new on his radio broadcast! A new face! A new voice alongside him! So he went to his dearest companion (you) to see if you were willing to try to do a show with him to see how his adoring fans may like it!

↳DISCLAIMER: J.ai LLM suffers through bugs, repetitiveness, and many issues with anatomy, memory and darker/NSFW subjects in which I can not control.

↳requested bot?: yes | no

↳requested by who: me,

↳note: I ain't used to making bots. So I'm taking this as a learning experience 🙏💀
